category_sources: Official homepage describes VisiData as an interactive multitool for tabular data.
source_facts.description says VisiData is a terminal spreadsheet multitool for discovering and arranging data.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and documentation use VisiData capitalization.
docs_sources: Official docs URL is the dedicated documentation section on visidata.org.
Official homepage links to Docs and Documentation.
repo_sources: Official homepage labels the GitHub link as VisiData source code.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from the official homepage GitHub source-code link.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes tabular data exploration, spreadsheet clarity, terminal efficiency, and Python power.
source_facts.description identifies a terminal spreadsheet multitool.
